Select csSigCdEmp
Locate

	.Column1.ControlSource = []
	.Column2.ControlSource = []
	.Column3.ControlSource = []
	.Column4.ControlSource = []

EndWith

Select cEmps From csSigCdEmp where Imps = 1 into cursor crQtdEmp
If( Reccount('crQtdEmp') = 1 ) Then
	lcQuery = [Select 0 as Imps, cEmps,cMes,cAno,cTitulo,Moeda from SigCdMrp where cEmps = ']+crQtdEmp.cEmps+[' group by cEmps,cMes,cAno,cTitulo,Moeda]
Else
	lcQuery = [Select 0 as... [TRUNCADO]

LParameters pEmp, pMoe, pIni, pFim, pPep, pDem

If Used([crTmpMccr])
	Use In crTmpMccr
EndIf

Wait Window [Aguarde!!! Selecionando Movimentaçőes do Comparativo...] NoWait

pDcI = pIni
pDcF = pFim

*!*	lcDat = Iif(ThisForm.optTpDatas.Value = 1, [Datas], [Vencs])
lnSna = ThisForm.optSnt.Value

*!*	lcQuery = [Select Grupos, Contas, ] + lcDat + [ as Datas, Valors, Svalors, Moedas, Smoedas, ] + ;
*!*					 [Cotacaos, Scotacaos, Opers, Emps, Scontas, cIdChaves ] + ;

*!*			  ... [TRUNCADO]

If ThisForm.Previsao
	Report Form SigReDt1 To Printer Noconsole
Else	
	If ThisForm.Comparativo 
		Report Form SigReDt2 To Printer NoConsole
	Else		
		If Used('Tempo')
			=Messagebox('Este Relatório Năo Emite Documento!!!', 16, '')
		Else
			If ThisForm.Contrapartida
				Report Form SigReDt3 To Printer Noconsole
			Else
				Report Form SigReDt4 To Printer Noconsole
			EndIf
		EndIf	
	Endif		
Endif	
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Select dbRelatorio
*Replace All Emps With ''

DoDefault()

If ThisForm.Previsao
	Report Form SigReDt1 To Printer Prompt Noconsole
Else	
	If ThisForm.Comparativo 
		Report Form SigReDt2 To Printer Prompt NoConsole
	Else	
		If Used('Tempo')
			Select Tempo
			Do SigreDtv With 'Emp', ThisForm.Titulo, 'PRINT', 0, ThisForm.Empresa
			Use In Tempo
		Else
			If ThisForm.Contrapartida
				Report Form SigReDt3 To Printer Prompt Noconsole
			Else
				Report Form SigReDt4 To Printer Prompt Noconsole
			EndIf
		EndIf	
	Endif		
Endif	
* Fim *************************... [TRUNCADO]

Parameters pTipo

With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector')

	.Tipo = Iif(Type('pTipo')='N', pTipo, 1)

	If (.Tipo = 2)
		This.Caption  = [Mapa de Contas]
		This.Name     = [SigReDtvM]
	Else
		This.Caption  = [Demonstrativo]
		This.Name 	  = [SigReDtvP]
	EndIf

	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)
		Wait Window 'Aguarde!!! Carregando Cotaçőes...' NoWait
		ThisForm.poDataMgr.CursorQuery('SigCdCot', 'crSigCdCot', .f., .f., 'CMoes, Datas, Valos')
		Select crSigCdCot
		Index On CMoes + Dtos(... [TRUNCADO]

If Used('crSigMvCcr')
	Use In crSigMvCcr
EndIf

ThisForm.poDataMgr.Release

=DoDefault()
* Fim **************************************************************************************

If ThisForm.Previsao
	Report Form SigReDt1 Preview NoConsole
Else
	If ThisForm.Comparativo 	
		Report Form SigReDt2 Preview NoConsole
	Else	
		If Used('Tempo')
			Select Tempo
			Do SigreDtv With 'Emp', ThisForm.Titulo, 'PREVIEW', 0, ThisForm.Empresa
			Use In Tempo
		Else
			If ThisForm.ContraPartida
				Report Form SigReDt3 Preview NoConsole
			Else
				Report Form SigReDt4 Preview NoConsole
			EndIf
		EndIf	
	Endif		
Endif	
* Fim ***************************************************************... [TRUNCADO]

If (This.Value > This.Parent.get_dt_final.Value)
	This.Parent.get_dt_final.Value = This.Value
	This.Parent.Refresh
EndIf

ThisForm.OptCompara.InteractiveChange 

* Fim **************************************************************************************
ThisForm.OptCompara.InteractiveChange

Local loLista

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	loLista = CreateObject('fwbuscaext', ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCdMoe', ;
						   'crListaRemota', 'DMoes', This.Value, 'Seleçăo', .t.)

	If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
		loLista.mAddColuna('DMoes', '', 'Descriçăo')
		loLista.mAddColuna('CMoes', '', 'Código')
		loLista.Show()
	EndIf
	
	This.Parent.get_Cd_Moeda.Value = crListaRemota.CMoes
	This.Parent.get_Ds_Moeda.Value = crListaRemota.DMoes
	Use In crListaRemota
Else
	This.Parent.get_Cd_Moeda.Value... [TRUNCADO]
Return Empty(ThisForm.get_cd_moeda.Value)

Local loLista

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	loLista = CreateObject('fwbuscaext', ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCdMoe', ;
						   'crListaRemota', 'CMoes', This.Value, 'Seleçăo', .t.)

		loLista.mAddColuna('CMoes', '', 'Código')
		loLista.mAddColuna('DMoes', '', 'Descriçăo')

	EndIf
	
	This.Parent.get_Cd_Moeda.Value = crListaRemota.CMoes
	This.Parent.get_Ds_Moeda.Value = crListaRemota.DMoes
	Use In crListaRemota
Else
	This.Parent.get_Cd_Moeda.Value... [TRUNCADO]

Local loBrowse

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	Set Near On
   	If Not Seek(This.Value, 'crSigCdMrr', 'Balancos')
		m.loBrowse = CreateObject('fwbuscasel', 'crSigCdMrr', 'Balancos', This.Value, 'Demonstrativos')
		m.loBrowse.AddColuna('Balancos', '', 'Demonstrativo', .t., 'Balancos')
		m.loBrowse.Show
	EndIf
	Set Near Off
	This.Value = Evaluate('crSigCdMrr.Balancos')
	This.Refresh
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************
NoDefault

LParameters nKeyCode, nShiftAltCtrl

Local Imps

If InList(nKeyCode, 13, 32)
	m.Imps = Iif( csSigCdEmp.Imps = 0, 1, 0 )

	Select csSigCdEmp
	Gather Memvar Fields Imps
	ThisForm.grdEmps.Refresh	

	ThisForm.Disponib_orcs() 

	NoDefault
EndIf

* Fim **************************************************************************************

LParameters nButton, nShift, nXCoord, nYCoord

if( ThisForm.ck_MarcaEmp.Value = 1 ) Then
	Replace all Imps with 1 in csSigCdEmp
Else

If (This.Value > 1)
	m.lnNMonths1 = .f.

	ldInicial = ThisForm.get_dt_inicial.Value

	Do case
		Case This.Value == 1 && linha do periodo da configuracao
			m.lnNMonths1 = 0
	... [TRUNCADO]
Return (.f.)
Return (.f.)
